description: A NASA Commercial Crew mission requires an updated climatological assessment for a September splashdown. Based on the mandate at ~/Desktop/splashdown_assessment_mandate.txt, use NASA Panoply to analyze Sea Surface Temperature (sst.ltm.1991-2020.nc) and Precipitation Rate (prate.sfc.mon.ltm.nc) datasets from ~/PanoplyData/. Export September geographic maps for both variables to ~/Documents/RecoveryOps/ and determine the SST values for candidate sites Alpha (Gulf of Mexico) and Bravo (off Baja California). Produce a structured recommendation report identifying the safer site using the 26.5°C tropical cyclone formation threshold.
